message:
feat(dashboard): smart animation with adaptive tick rate (fixes #32)

Reduces dashboard flicker when idle by dynamically adjusting tick rate:
- Active state: 100ms tick (default, for smooth animations)
- Idle state: 500ms tick (after 5s of inactivity)

Activity detection:
- Keyboard input sets state to Active
- Pane output arrival sets state to Active
- After idle timeout, transitions to Idle

Environment variables:
- NTM_REDUCE_MOTION=1: disables animation tick increment entirely
- NTM_DASHBOARD_TICK_MS: customize base tick (default 100ms)
- NTM_IDLE_TICK_MS: customize idle tick (default 500ms)
- NTM_IDLE_TIMEOUT_SECS: customize idle timeout (default 5s)

The existing NTM_REDUCE_MOTION support in styles.Shimmer() provides
static gradients instead of animated shimmer when enabled.

Expected results:
- 50%+ CPU reduction when dashboard is idle
- No visible flicker on idle terminals
- Smooth animations during active use

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
